description:
Activates the given keyname for the current user profile. The keys are used to unlock missions or campaigns.
See <syntaxhighlight lang="cpp" inline>keys</syntaxhighlight>, <syntaxhighlight lang="cpp" inline>keysLimit</syntaxhighlight> and <syntaxhighlight lang="cpp" inline>doneKeys</syntaxhighlight> in the [[Description.ext#Mission Keys]] chapter.
name: activateKey
